what-is-convergence.instruction: Define 'convergence' in human-AI collaboration. How it differs from AI as tool, assistant, and partner.
what-is-convergence.successMessage: Convergence is the deepest human-AI relationship. You articulated the vision.

the-digital-twin.instruction: Design your ideal digital twin. What it knows, what it decides autonomously, what it should NEVER do without asking.
the-digital-twin.successMessage: Designing your twin is designing your extended self.

persistent-memory-architecture.instruction: Design persistent memory for an AI twin: types to store, organization, when to forget, handling contradictions.
persistent-memory-architecture.successMessage: Memory architecture is the soul of a digital twin.

autonomous-agent-design.instruction: Design autonomy levels L1-L5 for your twin. Each: what it can do, safeguards, what triggers next level.
autonomous-agent-design.successMessage: Graduated autonomy builds trust between human and machine.

emotional-intelligence-for-ai.instruction: Design emotional awareness for an AI twin: signals to detect, responses to different states, ethical boundaries.
emotional-intelligence-for-ai.successMessage: Emotionally aware AI — powerful and delicate. Your design respects both.

values-alignment-in-practice.instruction: Define 5 core values for your AI twin. How each influences decisions. Include a value conflict scenario and resolution.
values-alignment-in-practice.successMessage: Values alignment made practical. The most important unsolved AI problem.

privacy-and-trust.instruction: Privacy framework for your twin: data access rules, who sees your data, revocation, breach response.
privacy-and-trust.successMessage: Privacy isn't a feature, it's a right. Your framework protects it.

life-operating-systems.instruction: Design a Life OS: AI managing health, finances, relationships, career, growth. What does each module do?
life-operating-systems.successMessage: The ultimate convergence application. Your operating system for living.

the-future-of-human-ai.instruction: Your vision for human-AI convergence in 2030. What's possible, what to be careful about, what excites you most.
the-future-of-human-ai.successMessage: Visionary thinking grounded in practical caution. The convergence lab mindset.

your-convergence-project.instruction: Capstone: design your convergence project. What you'll build, architecture, what makes it uniquely yours. Your thesis.
your-convergence-project.successMessage: Your convergence thesis. You've graduated from the Lab. Now go build it.
